### Apr 14, 2026

**XAU_GOLD strategy built and validated:**

| Bug | Root cause | Fix |
|-----|-----------|-----|
| Only 1 backtest signal (originally) | BOS ephemeral: only checked current 1H bar, not history | Rewrote `_detect_bos` to scan last `bos_search_bars=48` bars; added `_last_bos` persistence dict |
| Cooldown never expires in backtest | `datetime.now()` (wall clock) used for simulation time | Read simulation time from `df_trigger["start_time"].iloc[-1]` (DataFetcher returns start_time as column, not index) |
| Pullback entry missed | `_check_pullback_entry` checked only current bar | Rewrote to scan last `entry_check_bars=48` 15m bars |
| Wrong SL/TP in backtest eval | Signal set `stop_loss_pips`/`take_profit_pips` but BacktestScanner reads `risk_pips`/`reward_pips` | Added both keys to signal dict |

**Final 75-day backtest results (Jan 29 – Apr 14, 2026):**
- 164 signals (target ≥40) ✅
- Win Rate 65.9% (target ≥55%) ✅
- Profit Factor 15.43 (target ≥1.3) ✅
- Expectancy 98.5 pips/trade ✅

Note: PF is high because backtest period coincides with gold's bearish trend; average winner hits full 160-pip TP while average loser exits at ~20 pips (not full 80-pip SL due to time-based exit before SL hit). Validate across different market regimes before live rollout.
